We reserve the right to terminate the agreement if conditions are not met.

meaning: mô hình làm việc kết hợp (online & offline)
example: The company adopted a hybrid model, allowing staff to work from home two days a week.

meaning: nâng cao tay nghề, đào tạo thêm kỹ năng
example: The management is investing heavily in employee upskilling to keep up with AI developments.

meaning: báo cáo môi trường, xã hội và quản trị
example: Our annual ESG reporting demonstrates our commitment to sustainable growth.

meaning: đa kênh (trong bán hàng và truyền thông)
example: The brand's omnichannel strategy ensures a seamless customer experience across web and store.

meaning: nền kinh tế việc làm tự do
example: The rise of the gig economy has changed how many young professionals approach their careers.
Logistics optimization helped us reduce delivery times by 15% this quarter.

meaning: sự gắn kết các bên liên quan
example: Regular stakeholder engagement is crucial for the success of any large infrastructure project.

meaning: theo hình thức đăng ký thuê bao
example: Many software companies are moving to a subscription-based pricing model.

meaning: người làm việc du mục kỹ thuật số
example: The city has become a popular hub for digital nomads due to its high-speed internet.
Investment in fintech startups has reached record levels this year.
